requestment_date.text: วันที่ขอกู้

root.sql:
select coalesce(tab.salary_amount*recoverable,0) as c_salary_rights ,coalesce((tab.salary_amount + tab.academic_amount )*tab.recoverable,0) as c_salary_wat ,coalesce(( tab.salary_amount*tab.recoverable_non ) + ( tab.evaluate_amount * 0.7 ),0) as c_equal_non ,tab.* from ( SELECT sc_lon_m_loan_request.req_contract_period as req_contract_period, coalesce(pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_rule_loanpermit_levelcustom( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,current_date ,'loan_by_salary')::numeric,0) as recoverable,
sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no,
coalesce(sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount*pka_lon_reqsrv.fp_rule_loanpermit_levelcustom( 'ส' ,sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no ,current_date ,'loan_by_salary')::numeric,0) as recoverable_non,
pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no) as memname, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.position_code , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_control) as member_group_con_name, sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_share_value, sc_lon_m_loan_request.mem_request_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.remark, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan, sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint, sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share, sc_lon_m_loan_request.slip_balance, sc_lon_m_loan_request.bank_acc_no, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no, sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.shareloan_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.debtor_code, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.other_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request.flag_status, sc_lon_m_loan_request.max_loan_permit as max_loan_permit, sc_lon_m_loan_request.interest_first, sc_lon_m_loan_request.period_payment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_installment_amount, sc_lon_m_loan_request.salary_net_req, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_objective_code, sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_request_amount as loan_request_amount,
coalesce(( select sum (evaluate_amount) from sc_lon_m_req_coll WHERE sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as evaluate_amount,
coalesce(( select sum (principal_of_loan) from sc_lon_m_loan_history WHERE sc_lon_m_loan_history.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as principal_of_loan,
coalesce(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '11' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as academic_amount, coalesce(( select sum( item_amount ) from sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc where item_code = '12' and sc_lon_m_req_salnet_inc.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no ),0) as remuneration_amount,
( select telephone from sc_mem_m_member_address where sc_mem_m_member_address.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_member_address.address_type = '1' ) as telephone /*เบอร์โทร*/, sc_mem_m_membership_registered.grade, coalesce(sc_lon_m_loan_request.balance_salary,0) as balance_salary, PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_age( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as age_mem_text, PKA_LON_REQSRV.fp_calc_agetext_m_live( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract ) as agetext_live,
mem_request_amount - total_old_loan - total_oldint - fee_amount - buy_share as paid_amount /*รับจริง*/
FROM sc_lon_m_loan_request, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_ucf_prename, sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_lon_m_rule WHERE ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.cancel_status = '0') and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_group_code = '03')
/*WHERE*/ -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date = to_date('18/02/2022' ,'dd/mm/yyyy' )) -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no = '006738') order by sc_lon_m_loan_request.membership_no )tab

r_amnat_loan_req_spec_nest_loan_old.sql:
select 'กู้เดิม '||sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no||' วงเงิน '||to_snumber((sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount)::bigint)||' บาท คงเหลือ ' ||to_snumber((sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance)::bigint)||' บาท ส่งแล้ว '||sc_lon_m_loan_card.last_period||' งวดๆละ '||to_snumber((sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount)::bigint)||' บาท' as loan_old
from sc_lon_m_contract, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_rule where ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type ) and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = {0}

r_amnat_loan_req_spec_nest_1.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_description ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.coll_ref_type ,sc_lon_m_ucf_coll_ref_type.coll_ref_description ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.evaluate_amount ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no ,sc_lon_m_req_coll.evaluate_amount * 0.7 as evaluate_amount_percent FROM sc_lon_m_req_coll ,sc_lon_req_coll_law_head ,sc_lon_m_ucf_coll_ref_type WHERE sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.doc_no = sc_lon_m_req_coll.ref_own_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_coll_ref_type.coll_ref_type = sc_lon_req_coll_law_head.coll_ref_type and sc_lon_m_req_coll.loan_requestment_no = {0} and sc_lon_m_req_coll.collateral_type_code = '04'
